project.title: Wasteland Survivors
project.description: Post-apocalyptic survival game set in ruined cities overtaken by mutated wildlife.
project.art_direction: gritty stylized 2D game art, muted desaturated palette with rust and toxic green accents, thick readable silhouettes

assets.name: raptor_scavenger
assets.description: friendly mutated velociraptor scavenger game character, scarred scales, light scrap harness with small green indicator lights (no weapons), one soft green cyber eye, sharp claws. FULL BODY including entire curved tail tip visible, centered with generous white margin on all sides, side view facing right, non-violent neutral pose
